releaseNotes:
v1.3.4: premium television focus system — multi-layer D-Pad treatment

Focus Engine (TVFocus.kt rewrite):
- SCALE_CARD 1.18x, SCALE_WIDE 1.12x, SCALE_HERO 1.06x, SCALE_BILLBOARD 1.03x
- Elevation: 3dp rest → 60dp focus, translationZ 22dp
- Glow: 3dp accent ring + 12dp soft halo (was 2dp + 6dp)
- Glow pulse: subtle breathing animation while focused (skipped reduced motion)
- Dim scrim: 30% black (was 22%) for stronger background recession
- Artwork brightness: +20% (was +14%)
- Border illumination: 2dp cyan stroke on card background when focused
- Sheen sweep: wider 160dp strip with 5-stop gradient
- Spring animation: OvershootInterpolator(1.4f) for focus, DecelerateInterpolator(2.2f) for unfocus
- DURATION_MS 200ms focus, 140ms fast snap-back

Unified Presenters:
- TVFeaturedPresenter: migrated from manual 1.05x focus to TVFocus with glow/dim/sheen
- TVSuggestionPresenter: migrated from manual 1.10x focus to TVFocus with glow/dim
- TVChannelPresenter: added accent border illumination via TVFocus.animateBorder()
- TVOnNowPresenter: added accent border illumination
- TVSettingsCardPresenter: added accent border illumination
- All presenters now share one unmistakable visual language

Billboard Hero Focus:
- TVBillboardView: added TVFocus glow overlay with pulse
- Backdrop brightness: 0.55 → 0.85 on focus (was 0.8)
- Watch Now button: 1.10x scale (was 1.08x) with spring animation
- Elevation: 30dp + 16dp translationZ
- GPU shadow colors: cyan-tinted spot/ambient

Guide Panel Focus (TVPlaybackActivity):
- Selected row: 1.06x scale (was 1.04x) with spring animation
- Background: 33% cyan with 77% cyan border (was 26%/55%)
- Elevation: 14dp + 8dp translationZ (was 10dp)
- Name text: cyan shadow glow when selected
- Logo brightness: full on selected, 75% on others
- Accent bar: wider (5dp) and taller (48dp) when selected

Source Chips:
- Cursor: 1.12x spring animation (was 1.08x instant)
- Playing: filled cyan background
- Cursor: 33% cyan background with white ring
- Elevation: 8dp cursor, 2dp rest

Row-Level Focus Awareness (TVBrowseFragment):
- Sibling rows dim to 72% alpha when a new row gains focus
- Smooth 250ms crossfade animation
- Active row stays at full alpha
- De-emphasis cancelled on view destroy
